recommendations.title: Gummo
recommendations.overview: Teenagers Solomon and Tummler kill time in Xenia, Ohio, a small town that has never recovered from the tornado that ravaged the community in the 1970s.

recommendations.title: The Beach Bum
recommendations.overview: An irreverent comedy about the misadventures of Moondog, a rebellious stoner and lovable rogue who lives large.

recommendations.title: Julien Donkey-Boy
recommendations.overview: Undiagnosed, untreated and generally untethered schizophrenic Julien lives with his pregnant younger sister, anorexic aspiring wrestler brother, sympathetic grandmother, and severely depressed and abusive German father.

recommendations.title: Trash Humpers
recommendations.overview: Follow a small group of elderly “Peeping Toms” through the shadows and margins of an unfamiliar world. Crudely documented by the participants themselves, we follow the debased and shocking actions of a group of true sociopaths the likes of which have

recommendations.title: Spring Breakers
recommendations.overview: After four college girls rob a restaurant to fund their spring break in Florida, they get entangled with a weird dude with his own criminal agenda.

recommendations.title: The Illusionist
recommendations.overview: A French illusionist travels to Scotland to work. He meets a young woman in a small village. Their ensuing adventure in Edinburgh changes both their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Local Hero
recommendations.overview: An American oil company sends a man to Scotland to buy up an entire village where they want to build a refinery. But things don't go as expected.

recommendations.title: The Babysitters
recommendations.overview: Seventeen-year-old Shirley is a good student who works as a babysitter in order to make money for college. One night Michael, a father Shirley works for, confesses he's unhappy with married life. Shirley has a crush on Michael, and seizes this moment

recommendations.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland

recommendations.title: Madea's Big Happy Family
